{{Quote|You are not quite the sniveling coward you appear to be.|Boba Fett|<ref name="ndp">{{JournalCite|14|No Disintegrations, Please}}</ref>}}
'''Rivo Xarren''', later known as '''The Storyteller''', was a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] and brother to [[Gaege Xarran]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|My only weapons are my computer and my mouth.|Rivo Xarran|<ref name="ndp" />}}
At some point around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="Chronology">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' Inferred from date of Fett's Vyrssa mission</ref> Xarran accidentally hacked into the records of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Nevertheless he stole the information he saw and sold it to the highest bidder. The Hutt retaliated, assigning [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to hunt him down. Xarran ran.

While on [[Inat Prime]], Fett planted a [[Microscopic subdermal tracker|subdermal tracker]] on Xarran and followed when the slicer fled to [[Vryssa]] where his brother, Gaege, a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], gave the man asylum in his garrison.

Fett infiltrated the base and in the fight that followed Rivo bartered for his life. Suggesting that Fett could tell Jabba that Rivo perished in the base's self-destruct, the hunter would still be able to collect the bounty. Fett agreed but promised to one day finish the job.

Many years later on [[Ladarra]], long after Jabba's death, Xarran recalled his past for gathered urchins he had come to entertain as The Storyteller. When the tale ended and the children left, he turned around to find Fett, who had been watching him tell the story.

Enigmatically, Fett presented the man with a [[Credit chit/Legends|credit chit]] worth Xarran's bounty then exited, The Storyteller somehow managing to understand.
